title: A NEW SIGNATURE PROTOCOL BASED ON RSA AND ELGAMAL SCHEME
author: J. Ettanfouhi and O. Khadir
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this paper, we present a new signature scheme based on factoring and discrete logarithm problems. Derived from a variant of ElGamal signature protocol and the RSA algorithm, this method can be seen as an alternative protocol if known systems are broken.
steps_raw: In this paper, we present a new signature scheme based on factoring and discrete logarithm problems. Derived from a variant of ElGamal signature protocol and the RSA algorithm, this method can be seen as an alternative protocol if known systems are broken.
